name: Saute of Chicken Breasts with Coconut Milk and Herbs (Mf)
recipeIngredient: Boneless skinless chicken breast halves (split into two)
Half a lime or lemon (seeds removed)
Small scallion, trimmed and finely sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the thicker side of each chicken breast between sheets of plastic wrap until evenly thickened, then season lightly with salt.
2. Heat sesame oil in a skillet over moderate heat.
3. Add chicken breasts and tenderloins to the skillet.
4. Saute the chicken without disturbing for 4-5 minutes, or until opaque on top (tenderloins may cook faster, 2-3 minutes per side).
5. Turn the chicken over and saute again for another 4-5 minutes, or until fully cooked through.
6. Remove chicken to a plate; discard any remaining fat in the skillet.
7. Squeeze lime juice into the skillet and scrape up coagulated juices.
8. Add coconut milk and bring mixture to a simmer.
9. Whisk in scallions and cilantro; season with salt and dried red pepper flakes.
